---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an incorrect finding, false positive, or tool crash
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

### Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

### Reproduction
```bash
# Command that triggered the issue
ansede-static <path> --flag ...
```

### Code sample
```python
# Minimal code that reproduces the issue
```

### Expected behavior
What should have happened.

### Actual behavior
What happened instead (paste output if applicable).

### Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- ansede-static version: [`ansede-static --version`]
- Python version: [`python --version`]

### Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
